{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603222001526081DD258FF3C2FD06E5"}"},"total":3930},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7029861385362916136","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书对于龙珠迷来说，是一本很不错的同人小说了。并且把挖的坑都填上了。虽然中间有些地方可能有点让人觉得无脑，但是站在读者的视角也就是上帝视角上，如果带入林尘本人的话也就合理了。
话说我看这本书回忆起了当年初中的时候全班男生拿着龙珠漫画书看的热火朝天的日子了。虽然我只是把z和gt还有几部剧场版看完了，超看到一截就看不下去了，龙珠超的游戏也玩过……真是时光一去不复返。看着这本书的时候，耳边竟然还会想起渐渐被你吸引。说实话，龙珠gt真心是很不错的同人了，最后的结局真的我很喜欢。","text_exts":[{"e":6,"s":4,"text":"于龙","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%8E%E9%BE%99&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774180912C2FD06E5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227029861385362916136%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226810701783841639438%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%8E%E9%BE%99%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":78,"s":76,"text":"林尘","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9E%97%E5%B0%98&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774180912C2FD06E5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227029861385362916136%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226810701783841639438%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9E%97%E5%B0%98%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1636767155,"group_id":"6810701783841639438","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6jQ/f+VlKUqPLBk74O6uRU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702450&x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"66562092468","user_name":"爱吃霉苋菜梗的金蛟龙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"66562092468","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6810701783841639438","book_info":{"abstract":"林尘穿越龙珠世界，意外觉醒最强选择系统。
“选择一：击败弗利萨，阻止贝吉塔行星的毁灭。奖励：传说赛亚人血脉。”
“选择二：击败界王神。奖励：界王神之力。”
“选择三：击败破坏神，阻止贝吉塔行星的毁灭。奖励：破坏神之力。”
“以上任务，限时4年完成其一，否则抹杀宿主！”
坑爹呢！我一个只有1000战斗力的赛亚人，怎么完成这些任务？

_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"722"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603222001526081DD258FF3C2FD06E5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":21,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":94344,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":29716},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353950694832915224","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我是龙珠迷！这本📖整体结构非常符合原著，把所有原著不理解的地方都给出了合理解释！而且加上了新的构思，非常巧妙，有一种这就是原著的感觉！满足了我对龙珠的幻想，没有烂尾，但我觉得应该还能写很多，就这样结局了感觉少了些什么，意犹未尽吧！相信很多龙珠迷看过，网上那个白神悟空和一拳超人合体，还有全王和他的两个仆人合体那段！加上这样结局会好一点！毕竟我们都好奇全王到底有多强！战斗起来到底什么样！还有大神官天使们！如果来一个全体出动一起抵御boss，估计很是振奋人心吧！","text_exts":[{"e":139,"s":135,"text":"一拳超人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E6%8B%B3%E8%B6%85%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774180912C2FD06E5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227353950694832915224%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226810701783841639438%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E6%8B%B3%E8%B6%85%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712226835,"group_id":"6810701783841639438","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N60wpYo1vA8xdjuQr2oqvPA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"110049932151","user_name":"爱吃烧针亮鱼的小满"}
